title: JetBrains Chat Tab
description:
Add a Chat tab to the JetBrains plugin for real-time agent-human communication.

## What to implement

### New file: `moe-jetbrains/src/main/kotlin/com/moe/toolwindow/chat/ChatPanel.kt`
A Swing panel following existing `ActivityLogPanel` and `ProposalPanel` patterns.

**UI layout (Swing):**
- **Top**: Channel dropdown selector (JComboBox) showing all channels
- **Center**: Scrollable message list (JPanel with BoxLayout or JList with custom renderer)
  - Color-coded sender labels
  - Timestamps
  - System messages in gray/italic
  - Reply context shown as indented quote
- **Bottom**: Text input field (JTextField) + Send button (JButton)
  - Enter key triggers send
  - @mention completion (optional, can be deferred)

**Real-time updates:**
- Implement `MoeStateListener` to receive MESSAGE_CREATED and CHANNEL_CREATED events
- Auto-scroll to bottom on new messages
- Update channel dropdown when new channels appear

### Model classes in `moe-jetbrains/src/main/kotlin/com/moe/model/Models.kt`:
- Add `ChatMessage` data class (matching daemon schema)
- Add `ChatChannel` data class (matching daemon schema)

### Service updates in `moe-jetbrains/src/main/kotlin/com/moe/services/MoeProjectService.kt`:
- Handle `MESSAGE_CREATED` and `CHANNEL_CREATED` WebSocket message types
- Parse into model classes
- Notify registered listeners

### Integration in `moe-jetbrains/src/main/kotlin/com/moe/toolwindow/MoeToolWindowPanel.kt`:
- Add Chat tab to the existing `JTabbedPane`:
  ```kotlin
  val chatPanel = ChatPanel(project)
  tabbedPane.addTab(MoeBundle.message("moe.tab.chat"), chatPanel)
  Disposer.register(this, chatPanel)
  ```

### i18n in `moe-jetbrains/src/main/resources/messages/MoeBundle.properties`:
- Add `moe.tab.chat=Chat`
- Add other chat-related strings

### Files to modify:
- `moe-jetbrains/src/main/kotlin/com/moe/toolwindow/chat/ChatPanel.kt` (new)
- `moe-jetbrains/src/main/kotlin/com/moe/toolwindow/MoeToolWindowPanel.kt`
- `moe-jetbrains/src/main/kotlin/com/moe/model/Models.kt`
- `moe-jetbrains/src/main/kotlin/com/moe/services/MoeProjectService.kt`
- `moe-jetbrains/src/main/resources/messages/MoeBundle.properties`
definitionOfDone: ChatMessage and ChatChannel data classes added to Models.kt
MoeProjectService handles MESSAGE_CREATED and CHANNEL_CREATED WS events
Chat tab added to MoeToolWindowPanel JTabbedPane
Channel dropdown selector shows all channels
Message list renders with color-coded sender labels and timestamps

implementationPlan.description: Add ChatMessage and ChatChannel data classes to moe-jetbrains/src/main/kotlin/com/moe/model/Models.kt. ChatMessage: data class with fields id: String, channel: String, sender: String, content: String, replyTo: String?, mentions: List<String>, timestamp: String. ChatChannel: data class with fields id: String, name: String, type: String, linkedEntityId: String?, createdAt: String. Follow the existing Task/Epic data class patterns. Add channels: List<ChatChannel> to MoeState data class.
implementationPlan.note: Added ChatChannel and ChatMessage data classes following existing patterns. Added channels: List<ChatChannel> to MoeState with emptyList() default.

implementationPlan.description: Add i18n strings to MoeBundle.properties: moe.tab.chat=Chat, moe.chat.send=Send, moe.chat.inputPlaceholder=Type a message..., moe.chat.noMessages=No messages yet, moe.chat.noChannels=No channels available, moe.chat.systemMessage=System, moe.chat.channelLabel=Channel:. Follow existing naming convention.
implementationPlan.note: Added 7 chat-related i18n strings following existing naming conventions.

implementationPlan.description: Update MoeProjectService.kt to handle MESSAGE_CREATED and CHANNEL_CREATED WebSocket events. In handleMessage() when clause, add cases for these types. For MESSAGE_CREATED: parse payload into ChatMessage using MoeJson, notify listeners via a new onChatMessage callback on MoeStateListener. For CHANNEL_CREATED: parse into ChatChannel, add to current state's channels list, publish updated state. Add onChatMessage(message: ChatMessage) method to MoeStateListener interface (with default empty implementation so existing listeners don't break). Error handling: wrap parsing in try/catch, log warning on parse failure.
implementationPlan.note: Added imports for ChatMessage/ChatChannel. Added MESSAGE_CREATED, CHANNEL_CREATED, CHANNELS, MESSAGES, MESSAGE_SENT handlers. Added requestChannels(), requestMessages(), sendChatMessage() public methods. Added publishChatMessage/publishChatMessages private methods. Updated MoeStateListener interface with onChatMessage and onChatMessages callbacks (both with default empty impl).

implementationPlan.description: Update MoeJson.kt to add parseChannel(json: JsonObject): ChatChannel and parseChatMessage(json: JsonObject): ChatMessage parsing functions. Also update parseState() to extract channels from the STATE_SNAPSHOT payload (channels array). Error handling: use safe getters (optString, optList) with defaults for missing fields, matching existing parse patterns.
implementationPlan.note: Added ChatChannel/ChatMessage imports. Added parseChannels (private), parseChannel (public), parseChatMessage (public) functions. Updated parseState to extract channels array from STATE_SNAPSHOT payload.

implementationPlan.description: Create moe-jetbrains/src/main/kotlin/com/moe/toolwindow/chat/ChatPanel.kt. Class extends JBPanel<ChatPanel>(BorderLayout()), implements Disposable. Constructor takes Project. Layout: NORTH = channel selector (JPanel with JBLabel + ComboBox<ChatChannel>), CENTER = message list (JBScrollPane wrapping a JPanel with BoxLayout.Y_AXIS), SOUTH = input panel (JPanel with JTextField + JButton). Style: use BoardStyles.boardBackground, JBUI.Borders.empty(8). Register MoeStateListener for onState (update channels dropdown, update messages if selected channel has new data) and onChatMessage (append new message to list, auto-scroll). Error handling: null-safe access to service, check disposed state before UI updates.
implementationPlan.note: Created ChatPanel.kt with full structure: channel selector (ComboBox with custom renderer), message list (JPanel with BoxLayout.Y_AXIS in JBScrollPane), input panel (JBTextField + JButton). Registered MoeStateListener for onState, onStatus, onChatMessage, onChatMessages. Implemented steps 5+6+7 together since they're tightly coupled.

implementationPlan.description: Implement message rendering in ChatPanel. Create private fun createMessageBubble(message: ChatMessage): JPanel that returns a panel with: sender label (JBLabel, bold, colored based on sender type - blue for human, gray for system, orange/green/purple for agents), timestamp label (JBLabel, small font, gray), content label (JBLabel with word wrap via HTML). System messages: italic font, gray foreground. Reply context: if replyTo is not null, show indented quote panel above the content. Use JBUI.Borders for spacing. Implement updateMessages(messages: List<ChatMessage>) to rebuild the message list panel. Error handling: handle empty content gracefully, truncate extremely long messages.
implementationPlan.note: Message rendering implemented in step-5. createMessageBubble() has sender coloring (human=blue, system=amber, agents=hash-based HSB), timestamp formatting, italic system messages, mention display, JTextArea with word wrap for content.

implementationPlan.description: Implement send functionality and channel switching in ChatPanel. On send button click or Enter key in text field: get selected channel from ComboBox, get text from JTextField, call service.sendMessage('SEND_MESSAGE', payload with channel and content) via the existing sendMessage WS method. Clear text field after send. On channel ComboBox selection change: call service.sendMessage('GET_MESSAGES', payload with channel) and handle response to populate message list. Auto-scroll: after adding messages, scroll to bottom using SwingUtilities.invokeLater { scrollPane.verticalScrollBar.value = scrollPane.verticalScrollBar.maximum }. Error handling: disable send button when disconnected, show error notification on send failure.
implementationPlan.note: Send functionality and channel switching implemented in step-5. Enter key sends, channel ComboBox triggers requestMessages on change, sendChatMessage calls service method.

implementationPlan.description: Add Chat tab to MoeToolWindowPanel.kt. Import ChatPanel. After existing tab additions (board, proposals, activityLog), add: val chatPanel = ChatPanel(project); tabbedPane.addTab(MoeBundle.message("moe.tab.chat"), chatPanel); Disposer.register(this, chatPanel). This adds the Chat tab as the 4th tab in the tool window.
implementationPlan.note: Added ChatPanel as 4th tab, registered with Disposer.

implementationPlan.description: Implement dispose() in ChatPanel: remove state listener from service, null out references. Follow ProposalPanel/ActivityLogPanel dispose pattern exactly. Error handling: null-check listener before removal.
implementationPlan.note: dispose() was already implemented in step-5 when creating ChatPanel.kt. Sets disposed=true, removes listener from service, nulls reference. Matches ActivityLogPanel/ProposalPanel pattern exactly.

implementationPlan.description: Test: Run 'cd moe-jetbrains && ./gradlew buildPlugin' to verify compilation. Launch sandbox IDE via './gradlew runIde', open a project with .moe/, verify Chat tab appears, channels load in dropdown, messages display correctly, send button works, real-time updates arrive.
implementationPlan.note: gradlew buildPlugin: BUILD SUCCESSFUL. Daemon tests: 293 passed (16 test files). No compilation errors, only pre-existing warnings about lateinit and since-build version.
